'''''Star Wars Manga: The Empire Strikes Back'' 3''' is the third volume in ''The Empire Strikes Back'' manga series. It was illustrated by [[Toshiki Kudo]] and [[David Land]] and was based upon the original story by [[George Lucas]].

[[File:SWManga_TESB3.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Cover art.]]
